subcodes.first_line: There is no mystery but hath been revealed through the power of Truth, and no wisdom but hath been sent down by the All-Wise, exalted is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما من سر الا و قد ظهر بالحق و ما من حکمه الا و قد انزلها الحکیم قد ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation, @power of the Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
